solution: ```class RecentCounter:
    def __init__(self):
        self.q = []

    def ping(self, t: int) -> int:
        self.q.append(t)
        while self.q[0] < t - 3000:
            self.q.pop(0)
        return len(self.q)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1) amortized per ping
space complexity: O(n) where n is the number of pings in the sliding window
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses a simple queue to store ping times. Each ping is appended, then old entries outside the 3000 ms window are removed from the front. Amortized O(1) because each element is enqueued and dequeued at most once.
